## Summary

Describe the problem and the solution.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Tested relevant behavior on mobile and desktop
- [ ] Checked keyboard accessibility for new interactions

## Database and security

- [ ] No database change
- [ ] Database change includes a timestamped migration and RLS policies
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, or generated output are included

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots for visible UI changes, with private information
removed.
